gist.headline: Finer grains of pollen
gist.blurb: We've polished up the usage dashboard so you can track your pollen consumption down to the hour. Plus, charts look much cleaner on mobile now!
gist.summary: Upgraded the account usage dashboard to support hourly data granularity for daily views and improved mobile chart formatting.
gist.impact: You can now track your API usage with much greater precision and enjoy a cleaner, better-fitting chart on mobile devices.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee looking closely at a clean, glowing bar chart on a retro monitor, holding a magnifying glass to inspect the tiny 'grains' of data.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a glowing retro computer monitor displaying a neat, colorful bar chart. The bee is holding a small magnifying glass over the screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
